title: corybas viridisepalus
intro: Corybas viridisepalus, also known as the green-striped hood orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Corybas viridisepalus include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve boiling or infusing the roots or leaves in water to create a medicinal tea or paste.
